raw_source.title: [Remote] Yodayo Hiring Staff Software Engineer $120-150k/year
raw_source.body:
## 公司/团队介绍
Hiring for Portfolio Company
Yodayo is an AI-driven art platform tailored for vTubers and anime fans, offering AI-generated anime art, prompts, and a vibrant community to share creations.

Looking for a staff software engineer who can potentially lead projects or initiatives end-to-end including leading other engineers. We have an anime focused text-to-image generator, AI chatbots and social feed. We have over 10k daily active users and we are trying to grow 10-20x in the next 6 months.

## 薪资福利待遇
Compensation depending on experience:
Base salary: $120-150k/year
Stock options: 1-3% with 4 year vesting

## 地点

- 工作地点：Remote
- 联系方式：shuning@opcrypto.vc

## 工作性质

- 是否全职：Yes
- 是否远程：Yes 

## 岗位要求、职责
**Responsibilities**

- Give engineering inputs to shape our product roadmap
- Drive features or projects end-to-end which can potentially involve leading other engineers
- Work with product and marketing to understand ‘what’ we are building and ‘whys’, and researching and presenting solutions with different trade-offs.
- Understand what we currently have in terms of tech-stack and know how to build in the current stage of our startup.

**Requirements**

- At least 3-5 years of software development experience to fit this role
- Proficient in Golang and/or Python
- REST APIs
- Optimizing database (currently, Postgres)
- Unit and Integration testing
- Data pipes (currently, Dataflow)
- Kubernetes
- Distributed System

**Good to have knowledge of:**

- ElasticSearch
- Image generator: Stable Diffusion
- GPU optimizations, CUDA
- Networking, Security
- LLMs
- Vector database
- Voice generator

Compensation depending on experience:

Base salary: $120-150k/year

Stock options: 1-3% with 4 year vesting

We are a remote team of engineers who are trying to fulfill the fantasies of our users using recent advances in Generative AI.

## 工作环境
We are a remote team of engineers who are trying to fulfill the fantasies of our users using recent advances in Generative AI.

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
